title: senecio townsendii
intro: Senecio townsendii, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and aid in the removal of mucus from the lungs. Groundsel can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
